title: dronkos enhanced leaf litter
description: enhances leaf litter to be more colorful and bushy
body:
# **dronkos enhanced leaf litter**

the default leaf litter is sorta boring.

so now its blusher and more colorful.
adding more verity to the leaves with red and green leaves.

and leaves stracked on top of each over 
#

will work with over resource packs that change leaf textures.
